cd "/workspace/DQNMedian50/DQNMedian50/highway"

mkdir -p "/workspace/DQNMedian50/DQNMedian50/highway/results_highway_dqn_500_300_500"

nohup "python3" highway.py \
    --train-episodes 500 \
    --test-episodes 300 \
    --max-episode-steps 500 \
    --epsilon 0.2 \
    --gamma 0.99 \
    --batch-size 64 \
    --device cuda \
    --seed 42 \
    --output-dir "/workspace/DQNMedian50/DQNMedian50/highway/results_highway_dqn_500_300_500" \
    > "/workspace/DQNMedian50/DQNMedian50/highway/results_highway_dqn_500_300_500/highway_dqn_500_300_500.log" 2>&1 &

echo $! > "/workspace/DQNMedian50/DQNMedian50/highway/results_highway_dqn_500_300_500/highway.pid"
